name: Peaches and Cream Pie #4
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix the sugar and flour together.
3. Sprinkle one third of the mixture into the pie shell.
4. Add the peaches to the pie shell.
5. Sprinkle the peaches with the remaining sugar-flour mixture.
6. Pour the cream over top of the pie.
7. Move the peaches around so that the cream completely covers them.
8. Bake for 45 minutes.
9. Serve chilled.
